columns.name: DYRKER_RECNO
columns.description: Unique identifier for the dyrker record

columns.name: AAR
columns.description: The year associated with the data or event

columns.name: DATO_KONTROLLERT
columns.description: The date when the record was last controlled or verified

columns.name: MIST_PLANTER
columns.description: Indicator for misplanting, where 1 indicates a misplanting and 0 does not

columns.name: KOMMENTAR
columns.description: Additional comments or notes related to the record

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Identifier for the user who made the last change

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT_NYREG
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was newly registered

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT_ENDRET
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last updated or modified
